description:
## v1.0.2

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

* Compile patches to DEX (buildAndroid) so Morphe Manager can load the bundle — previous releases shipped JVM .class files with no classes.dex, which Manager rejects (0 patches / infinite load).

### ✨ Patches

* **Hide ads:** Removes all inline banner and native ads across the Me caller-ID app.
* **Disable interstitial ads:** Skips full-screen interstitials, including the one on launch.

Target: com.nfo.me.android 7.17.47
